alumni: Shengyu Li (2025) - PI in Houston Methodist, Weill Cornell Medical School
Ibrahem Kandel (2024) - AI Scientist, Grady Health System
Zeyu Yang (2023) - PhD student in Electrical and Computer Engineering, Rice University
Lingqun Ye (2022) - Associate Data Scientist, MD Anderson Cancer Center

members.bio: Pengzhi received a Ph.D. degree in Physics at the University of Houston. He investigates the dynamic of cellular states and cell-cell communication using statistical inference and machine learning.
members.name: Pengzhi Zhang

members.bio: Alex holds a Bachelor of Science in Mathematics with a minor in Finance. In Wang Lab, he manages GitHub, pipelines, and data servers, and contributes to collaborative projects with data analysis and visualization.
members.name: Tu (Alex) N Tran

members.bio: Weiqing is a Ph.D. student at Weill Cornell Medicine interested in the intersection of machine learning/deep learning and single-cell dynamics/spatial biology, particularly RNA velocity and computational pathology.
members.name: Weiqing Chen

members.bio: Yiwei graduated from Peking University with a Ph.D. in Pathogen Organism. He focuses on using AI models to develop novel tools for image language and sequencing data.
members.name: Yiwei Xiao

members.bio: Xiaohan is a Ph.D. student at Weill Cornell Medicine, leveraging deep learning to tackle complex genomic problems. She holds a master’s degree in Bioinformatics from Fudan University.
members.name: Xiaohan (Hannah) Zhao

members.bio: JS received a Ph.D. in Bioinformatics from CAS. After postdoctoral training at NCI-DCEG (NIH), he joined Wang Lab to develop emerging models for Omics and Epidemiological insights.
members.name: Jian Sang

members.bio: Qing Li received a Ph.D. in computer science from CAS. She focuses on developing AI models for computational pathology, single-cell dynamics, and spatial biology.
members.name: Qing Li

members.bio: Yuyan received a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Fudan University. She focuses on building large language and multimodal models for computational pathology and spatial biology.
members.name: Yuyan (Yolanda) Chen

bio_points: Director of Center for Bioinformatics and Computational Biology (CB2).
Associate Member, Research Institute, Houston Methodist / Weill Cornell Medical College.
pi.description: Dr. Wang’s research focuses on integrating multi-omics such as scRNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, and epigenetics to investigate the dynamics of cellular states and regulation mechanisms. He leads the lab in developing cutting-edge AI foundation models for biomedical research.
pi.name: Guangyu Wang, Ph.D.
